full_text_rationale: Full text describes an agentic Docker-building pipeline with a global/cross-task success memory pool of verified environment solutions reused across repository-level environment-construction tasks, with Multi-Docker-Eval and downstream SWE/Terminal benchmark evaluation.
extractor_notes: Fresh search architecture extraction batch 009; controlled-comparison and quality status remain pending aggregate recomputation.
autores: Jiaran Zhang, Luck Ma, Yanhao Li, Fanqi Wan, Di Qi, Xu Zhao, Jieyi Hou, Zhe Xie, Mengqiang Ren, Xin Wu, Zhewei Huang, Liangyu Chen, Yingwei Ma, Qi Han, Xiangyu Zhang
titulo: DockSmith: Scaling Reliable Coding Environments via an Agentic Docker Builder
formato_armazenamento: SWE-Factory global memory pool of validated Dockerfile and evaluation-script pairs, augmented for cross-task retrieval so verified environment solutions can serve as demonstrations for new repositories.
framework_agente: SWE-Factory-style multi-agent Docker-building pipeline with Context Retrieval, Dockerfile Generation, Eval Scripts Handling, Test Analysis, loop detector, and cross-task success memory
llm_utilizado: Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct; GPT-5.1 used as automated annotator for error analysis
metodo_avaliacao: benchmark; ablation; error analysis; case study
benchmarks_utilizados: Multi-Docker-Eval, SWE-bench Verified, SWE-bench Multilingual, Terminal-Bench 2.0
metricas_desempenho: Fail-to-Pass, Commit Rate, average input tokens, average output tokens, average Docker image count, SWE.V/SWE.M/Terminal scores, error counts, critical errors, terminal rate, resolution rate
baseline_comparado: DeepSeek-v3.1, DeepSeek-R1, GPT-OSS-20B, GPT-OSS-120B, Kimi-K2 variants, Qwen3-235B-A22B, Claude-Sonnet-4, GPT-5-Mini, Gemini-2.5-Flash, Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct, SWE-only and Docker-only training ablations, acceptance-shaping and curriculum ablations
tokens_entrada_por_tarefa: On Multi-Docker-Eval, DockSmith reports average input 207.68 versus Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct 150.10, DeepSeek-v3.1 158.11, and GPT-5-Mini 339.94.
tokens_saida_por_tarefa: On Multi-Docker-Eval, DockSmith reports average output 26.38 versus Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct 13.75, DeepSeek-v3.1 17.15, and GPT-5-Mini 103.32.
tamanho_memoria_ao_longo_tempo: Memory pool contains verified environment solutions generated from accepted, test-backed pull requests and is reused cross-task during trajectory generation; exact final pool size is NR.
custo_por_tarefa: NR; reports token/process metrics and controlled training-token mixing ratios but no monetary cost.
reducao_tokens: NR; DockSmith uses more input/output tokens than the base Qwen3-Coder baseline on Multi-Docker-Eval but achieves higher success.
resultado_principal: DockSmith reaches 39.72% Fail-to-Pass and 58.28% Commit Rate on Multi-Docker-Eval, exceeding evaluated open- and closed-source baselines and the prior reported upper bound of 37.7% F2P.
desempenho_vs_baseline: DockSmith improves +20.3 absolute F2P points over Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct. Error analysis reduces total errors from 3,757 to 2,161, critical errors by 40.2%, and average errors per trajectory from 11.81 to 6.67.
custo_vs_baseline: Compared with Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct, DockSmith increases average input tokens from 150.10 to 207.68 and output tokens from 13.75 to 26.38 while improving F2P from 19.46% to 39.72%.
limitacoes: Training and evaluation emphasize environment construction; some languages remain bottlenecked by compiler toolchains and system dependencies; context-retrieval errors increase under higher-recall retrieval.
ameacas_validade: Benchmark composition, automated GPT-5.1 error annotation, training-data filtering, token-level mixing ratio, and use of Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct as base model may affect validity.
